dict.string: DankDasher uses your location to receive dispatch offers nearby, route you to pickups and dropoffs, and share live ETAs with the customers you're delivering to.
DankDasher uses your location to receive dispatch offers nearby, route you to pickups and dropoffs, and share live ETAs with the customers you're delivering to.
DankDasher uses the camera to scan delivery documents (drivers license, vehicle registration, insurance) during onboarding and to verify customer IDs at handoff.
DankDasher reads photos from your library when you upload onboarding documents.
